pageContext.name: Masters of the Universe: Revelation Comic Series
pageContext.description: Dark Horse Direct is proud to present an exclusive Masters of The Universe limited edition 11 inch by 17 inch print of the variant comic cover by Bill Sienkiewicz from the Masters of the Universe: Revelation comic series written by Kevin Smith, Rob David, and Tim Sheridan (the official prequel to the Netflix show)!  Feel the power emanating from this beautiful piece that begs to adorn your wall! Printed as an 11 x 17 lithograph on archival paper and hand-numbered. This will be limited to just 300 units, never to be reproduced, making it a true collector's piece.  By the power of Grayskull, your love of Eternia will be reignited with this one-of-a-kind, collectible, lithograph print.  The power is YOURS to pre-order now!
